name: Grid Control
body:
[{"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "You can use grid control to transform your product presentation from uniform grids into dynamic, attention-capturing layouts that highlight featured products. When you strategically break regular product grid patterns with larger hero-sized product cards, you help capture shopper attention and reduce choice overload, which tends to enhance engagement and can improve conversion rates by focusing customers on key products."}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Grid control enables you to create more engaging merchandising experiences by strategically emphasizing specific products within search results and collection pages. This helps you showcase featured items, seasonal promotions, or high-margin products more effectively, supporting better visual merchandising and helping guide customers toward products that align with your business goals."}]}, {"type": "rich_embed_card", "dataSourceType": "image", "url": "https://files.readme.io/8016c5e-Hero_Grid_Control_Findify.png", "embedData": {"url": "https://files.readme.io/8016c5e-Hero_Grid_Control_Findify.png", "embedType": "image", "displaySize": "large", "float": "none", "name": "1626", "width": 1280, "height": 720}, "children": [{"text": ""}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Breaking the static grid with large product cards to increase inspiration.", "italic": true}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": ""}]}, {"type": "h2", "children": [{"text": "#1. What is Grid Control?"}], "data-id": "1-what-is-grid-control"}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Grid control is about transforming the grid from a regular pattern to a customized experience."}, {"text": "
"}, {"text": "
"}, {"text": "It builds on insights from behavioral psychology around choice overload where highlighted products will help halt the shopper & capture their attention."}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "The core of grid control consists of three areas:"}]}, {"type": "ul", "children": [{"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "The ability to break the regular pattern", "bold": true}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "The ability to control where the large product cards appear", "bold": true}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "The ability to alter appearance for different collections", "bold": true}]}]}]}, {"type": "rich_embed_card", "dataSourceType": "image", "url": "https://files.readme.io/f08bf9d-Grid_control_Overview.gif", "embedData": {"url": "https://files.readme.io/f08bf9d-Grid_control_Overview.gif", "embedType": "image", "displaySize": "large", "float": "none", "name": "1459", "width": 1280, "height": 720}, "children": [{"text": ""}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Overview of Grid Control applied", "italic": true}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": ""}]}, {"type": "h2", "children": [{"text": "#2. Control Mechanism"}], "data-id": "2-control-mechanism"}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Grid control can be set up on different levels."}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Level: Basic", "bold": true}, {"text": "
"}, {"text": "
"}, {"text": "All collections and/or search results are set up with the same regular pattern."}, {"text": "
"}, {"text": "
"}, {"text": "No client action is required beyond deciding the pattern."}]}, {"type": "blockquote", "children": [{"type": "blockquote-line", "children": [{"text": "Control is KingGrid control is built on the principle of full control.Merchants, therefore, have the possibility to control the appearance of individual collections, while the basic approach is available to not require any merchant action."}]}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Level: Intermediate", "bold": true}, {"text": "
"}, {"text": "
"}, {"text": "Covers "}, {"type": "a", "url": "https://developers.findify.io/docs/grid-control#3-grid-control-use-cases", "children": [{"text": "Use Cases"}]}, {"text": " #1 - 3."}, {"text": "
"}, {"text": "
"}, {"text": "This gives the merchant the ability to control each collection based on pre-determined profiles."}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Level: Advanced", "bold": true}, {"text": "
"}, {"text": "
"}, {"text": "Includes "}, {"type": "a", "url": "https://developers.findify.io/docs/grid-control#use-case-4-tailored-pattern", "children": [{"text": "Use Case #4"}]}, {"text": "."}, {"text": "
"}, {"text": "
"}, {"text": "This gives the merchant the ability to freely tailor collection appearances based on custom order per collection."}, {"text": "
"}, {"text": "
"}, {"text": "This freedom demands correct input values."}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Merchants utilizing Use Case #4 can of course freely combine that with use cases #1 - 3."}]}, {"type": "blockquote", "children": [{"type": "blockquote-line", "children": [{"text": "Platform CompatibilityThe following guide is written using data input fields in Shopify.The solution is, however, platform agnostic. All that is needed are collection specific input fields that can be exposed to Findify's MJS. For advice or guidance, please contact Findify's Customer Success Team"}]}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": ""}]}, {"type": "h2", "children": [{"text": "#3. Grid Control Use Cases"}], "data-id": "3-grid-control-use-cases"}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": ""}]}, {"type": "h3", "children": [{"text": "Use Case #1. REGULAR GRID"}], "data-id": "use-case-1-regular-grid"}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Level: Intermediate", "italic": true}, {"text": "

LEFT ALIGNED PATTERN"}], "data-id": "use-case-2-left-aligned-pattern"}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Level: Intermediate", "italic": true}, {"text": "

RIGHT ALIGNED PATTERN"}], "data-id": "use-case-3-right-aligned-pattern"}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Level: Intermediate", "italic": true}, {"text": "

TAILORED PATTERN"}], "data-id": "use-case-4-tailored-pattern"}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Level: Advanced", "italic": true}, {"text": "
", "italic": true}, {"text": "
", "italic": true}, {"text": "Output: Fully customizable option where the merchant can tailor each collection appearance freely.", "italic": true}]}, {"type": "rich_embed_card", "dataSourceType": "image", "url": "https://files.readme.io/79666bd-Grid_control_Custom.png", "embedData": {"url": "https://files.readme.io/79666bd-Grid_control_Custom.png", "embedType": "image", "displaySize": "large", "float": "none", "name": "1081", "width": 80}, "children": [{"text": ""}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Hero Positions (Large Size) appears based on specified positions.", "italic": true}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Collection Settings to Apply this:", "bold": true}]}, {"type": "rich_embed_card", "dataSourceType": "image", "url": "https://files.readme.io/41e31f3-Grid_Control-Pattern_setup-4.Tailored.png", "embedData": {"url": "https://files.readme.io/41e31f3-Grid_Control-Pattern_setup-4.Tailored.png", "embedType": "image", "displaySize": "large", "float": "none", "name": "632", "width": 1280, "height": 720}, "children": [{"text": ""}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Read more about specific use cases related to Tailored Patterns in the"}, {"type": "a", "url": "https://developers.findify.io/docs/grid-control#tailored-pattern", "children": [{"text": "FAQ Section"}]}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": ""}]}, {"type": "h2", "children": [{"text": "#4. Mobile Application"}], "data-id": "4-mobile-application"}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Due to it's limited screen space, grid control is more limited on mobile."}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Advised approach is utilizing a regular pattern where every 5th or 7th product is highlighted in Hero Size."}, {"text": "
"}, {"text": "
"}, {"text": "It is, however, possible to set up a more tailored approach utilizing the same logic as for desktop."}]}, {"type": "rich_embed_card", "dataSourceType": "image", "url": "https://files.readme.io/5583c82-Grid_Control_Mobile.gif", "embedData": {"url": "https://files.readme.io/5583c82-Grid_Control_Mobile.gif", "embedType": "image", "displaySize": "large", "float": "none", "name": "373", "width": 1280, "height": 720}, "children": [{"text": ""}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Mobile Grid Control with a regular pattern, showcasing hero sized images every fifth product.", "italic": true}, {"type": "a", "url": "https://www.lagerhaus.se/search", "children": [{"text": "Lagerhaus.se", "italic": true}]}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "To be filled out"}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": ""}]}, {"type": "h2", "children": [{"text": "#5. Grid Control FAQ"}], "data-id": "5-grid-control-faq"}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": ""}]}, {"type": "h3", "children": [{"text": "Product Card Appearance"}], "data-id": "product-card-appearance"}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Q: Will hero positions include CTA's, swatches, stickers, etc. as the regular product cards?", "bold": true}, {"text": "
"}, {"text": "A: Yes.", "bold": true}, {"text": " "}, {"text": "Grid control will show your regular product card appearance, only larger. It will not limit Findify's core capability to fully customize the product experience.", "italic": true}]}, {"type": "rich_embed_card", "dataSourceType": "image", "url": "https://files.readme.io/e166103-Stickers.png", "embedData": {"url": "https://files.readme.io/e166103-Stickers.png", "embedType": "image", "displaySize": "large", "float": "none", "name": "491", "width": 1280, "height": 720}, "children": [{"text": ""}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Example of stickers applied in hero positions. The experience can be fully customized to match clients' brand experience.", "italic": true}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Q: Does grid control demand larger product images?", "bold": true}, {"text": "
"}, {"text": "A:", "bold": true}, {"text": " "}, {"text": "Ideal image size depends on overall grid layout. Best practice is to minimize image sizes to maximize site speed. In Shopify, it is very easy to specify exact image sizes ", "italic": true}, {"type": "a", "url": "https://shopify.dev/api/liquid/filters/url-filters#image_url", "children": [{"text": "Reference", "italic": true}]}, {"text": ". The default for grid control is to load a larger image size for products appearing in the hero positions (1800 x 1800px) but that can easily be tailored in setup.", "italic": true}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": ""}]}, {"type": "h3", "children": [{"text": "Product Control"}], "data-id": "product-control"}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Q: Which product will be shown in the hero space?", "bold": true}, {"text": "
"}, {"text": "A:", "bold": true}, {"text": " "}, {"text": "Grid control does not affect the order of products. The hero space is set to a position and the product in that position will be enlarged", "italic": true}]}, {"type": "rich_embed_card", "dataSourceType": "image", "url": "https://files.readme.io/2e3fa32-Product_Order.png", "embedData": {"url": "https://files.readme.io/2e3fa32-Product_Order.png", "embedType": "image", "displaySize": "large", "float": "none", "name": "531", "width": 1280, "height": 720}, "children": [{"text": ""}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Order of products returned in the irregular pattern.", "italic": true}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Q: Can I control which products appear in each hero image?", "bold": true}, {"text": "
"}, {"text": "A: Yes.", "bold": true}, {"text": " "}, {"text": "Grid control does not affect the order of the products. Findify's ", "italic": true}, {"type": "a", "url": "https://developers.findify.io/docs/how-does-findify-machine-learning-work#personalization", "children": [{"text": "personalization", "italic": true}]}, {"text": ", ", "italic": true}, {"type": "a", "url": "https://developers.findify.io/docs/merchandising-rules-and-pinning", "children": [{"text": "merchandising rules & pinning ", "italic": true}]}, {"text": "will work as usual.", "italic": true}]}, {"type": "rich_embed_card", "dataSourceType": "image", "url": "https://files.readme.io/2c466b1-Visual_Merchandising.gif", "embedData": {"url": "https://files.readme.io/2c466b1-Visual_Merchandising.gif", "embedType": "image", "displaySize": "large", "float": "none", "name": "1042", "width": 1280, "height": 720}, "children": [{"text": ""}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "The regular ", "italic": true}, {"text": "visual merchandising", "bold": true, "italic": true}, {"text": " can be used to influence product order.", "italic": true}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": ""}]}, {"type": "h3", "children": [{"text": "Tailored Pattern"}], "data-id": "tailored-pattern"}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Q: Can I break the grid by selecting two overlapping positions?", "bold": true}, {"text": "
"}, {"text": "A: No.", "bold": true}, {"text": " "}, {"text": "If two positions are selected, the second will be disregarded", "italic": true}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Example:", "bold": true}]}, {"type": "rich_embed_card", "dataSourceType": "image", "url": "https://files.readme.io/34a21b1-Grid_Control-Pattern_setup-4.Tailored_Overlapping.png", "embedData": {"url": "https://files.readme.io/34a21b1-Grid_Control-Pattern_setup-4.Tailored_Overlapping.png", "embedType": "image", "displaySize": "large", "float": "none", "name": "631", "width": 1280, "height": 720}, "children": [{"text": ""}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Two overlapping positions have been selected", "italic": true}]}, {"type": "rich_embed_card", "dataSourceType": "image", "url": "https://files.readme.io/0b91010-Overlapping_Positions.png", "embedData": {"url": "https://files.readme.io/0b91010-Overlapping_Positions.png", "embedType": "image", "displaySize": "large", "float": "none", "name": "1538", "width": 80}, "children": [{"text": ""}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "The second position (#6) is disregarded since it is overlapping with enlarged position #1.", "italic": true}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Q: Can I activate a hero position in the middle of the grid?", "bold": true}, {"text": "
"}, {"text": "A: Not by default.", "bold": true}, {"text": " "}, {"text": "We've built grid control to be consistent across breaking points i.e. show the same experience on smaller screens with e.g. 4 product columns and large screens with e.g. 6 product columns. However, this is hence by design and not technical limitations. The feature is new and we want to evolve it to be as useful as possible. The best way to do that is from client feedback & real life use cases. Please ", "italic": true}, {"type": "a", "url": "mailto:yourfriends@findify.io", "children": [{"text": "connect with us ", "italic": true}]}, {"text": "to share your thoughts.", "italic": true}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Q: For a tailored pattern, which product position will be enlarged?", "bold": true}, {"text": "
"}, {"text": "A:", "bold": true}, {"text": " "}, {"text": "The product in the selected position will be enlarged. Note the difference below where the hero is displayed in the same positions (#1, 2, 5, 6) but the product displayed differs based on the decided position.", "italic": true}]}, {"type": "rich_embed_card", "dataSourceType": "image", "url": "https://files.readme.io/002b284-Custom_Position.png", "embedData": {"url": "https://files.readme.io/002b284-Custom_Position.png", "embedType": "image", "displaySize": "large", "float": "none", "name": "1205", "width": 1280, "height": 720}, "children": [{"text": ""}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Product enlarged according to selected position in use", "italic": true}, {"type": "a", "url": "https://developers.findify.io/docs/grid-control#use-case-4-tailored-pattern", "children": [{"text": "case #4: Tailored Pattern", "italic": true}]}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Q: I have defined the pattern to be left aligned, but I have also specified tailored positions. What will show?", "bold": true}, {"text": "
"}, {"text": "A: A Left Aligned Grid.", "bold": true}, {"text": " "}, {"text": "The Field "Large Cards: Pattern" is the master control to specify pattern. In order to apply the specified tailored positions, change pattern to "Tailored Positions".", "italic": true}]}, {"type": "rich_embed_card", "dataSourceType": "image", "url": "https://files.readme.io/bc25430-Grid_Control-Pattern_setup-4.Tailored_to_work.png", "embedData": {"url": "https://files.readme.io/bc25430-Grid_Control-Pattern_setup-4.Tailored_to_work.png", "embedType": "image", "displaySize": "large", "float": "none", "name": "635", "width": 1280, "height": 720}, "children": [{"text": ""}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Custom positions has been specified but the grid will show a regular left aligned pattern since this is selected in "Large Cards: Pattern"", "italic": true}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": ""}]}, {"type": "h3", "children": [{"text": "Platform Compliance"}], "data-id": "platform-compliance"}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Q: Is grid control only available for Shopify?", "bold": true}, {"text": "
"}, {"text": "A: No,", "bold": true}, {"text": " "}, {"text": "grid control can be applied on any platform. To apply ", "italic": true}, {"type": "a", "url": "https://developers.findify.io/docs/grid-control#3-grid-control-use-cases", "children": [{"text": "use case #1-4", "italic": true}]}, {"text": ", collection-specific input fields needs to be applied. The format of these will differ depending on platform structure. ", "italic": true}, {"type": "a", "url": "mailto:yourfriends@findify.io", "children": [{"text": "Get in touch with our team", "italic": true}]}, {"text": " to discuss ideal setup.", "italic": true}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Q: Is grid control available for API-integrations?", "bold": true}, {"text": "
"}, {"text": "A:", "bold": true}, {"text": " "}, {"text": "Grid control is rendered through Findify's React front-end library. In an API integration, this needs to be built into the experience. ", "italic": true}, {"type": "a", "url": "mailto:yourfriends@findify.io", "children": [{"text": "Get in touch with our team", "italic": true}]}, {"text": " for advice how this is achieved in our setup.", "italic": true}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": ""}]}, {"type": "h3", "children": [{"text": "General"}], "data-id": "general"}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Q: All examples in this guide includes 4 product columns. Is grid control available for grids in other sizes?", "bold": true}, {"text": "
"}, {"text": "A: Yes.", "bold": true}, {"text": " "}, {"text": "Like all other Findify components, grid control is built to match a wide variety of client experiences.", "italic": true}]}, {"type": "rich_embed_card", "dataSourceType": "image", "url": "https://files.readme.io/6239edb-Grid_with_3_product_columns.png", "embedData": {"url": "https://files.readme.io/6239edb-Grid_with_3_product_columns.png", "embedType": "image", "displaySize": "large", "float": "none", "name": "270", "width": 1280, "height": 720}, "children": [{"text": ""}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Grid control applied in a 3 product grid", "italic": true}]}, {"type": "rich_embed_card", "dataSourceType": "image", "url": "https://files.readme.io/fc6fe2a-6_product_grid.png", "embedData": {"url": "https://files.readme.io/fc6fe2a-6_product_grid.png", "embedType": "image", "displaySize": "large", "float": "none", "name": "668", "width": 1280, "height": 720}, "children": [{"text": ""}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Grid control applied in a 6 product grid", "italic": true}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Q: All examples in this guide includes a large size defined as: 2x2 regular products. Can I use other sizes?", "bold": true}, {"text": "
"}, {"text": "A: Technically, yes.", "bold": true}, {"text": " "}, {"text": "The current definitions are by design and not technical limitations. The grid control feature is new and we want to evolve it to be as useful as possible. The best way to do that is from client feedback & real life use cases. Please ", "italic": true}, {"type": "a", "url": "mailto:yourfriends@findify.io", "children": [{"text": "connect with us ", "italic": true}]}, {"text": "to share your thoughts.", "italic": true}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Q: How quickly is the grid updating?", "bold": true}, {"text": "
"}, {"text": "A: As soon as you save.", "bold": true}, {"text": " "}, {"text": "If your changes don't appear in the grid, you are most likely looking at a cached version. Remove your cache and reload the collection.", "italic": true}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Q: Will Grid Control work with any pagination?", "bold": true}, {"text": "
"}, {"text": "A: Yes.", "bold": true}, {"text": " "}, {"text": "But to maximize shopper experience, the number of products per page should be considered.", "italic": true}]}, {"type": "rich_embed_card", "dataSourceType": "image", "url": "https://files.readme.io/6af61ee-Grid_Positions.png", "embedData": {"url": "https://files.readme.io/6af61ee-Grid_Positions.png", "embedType": "image", "displaySize": "large", "float": "none", "name": "1811", "width": 1280, "height": 720}, "children": [{"text": ""}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Each "block" with two rows of big products and one of small contains 9 products. Suggested settings for products per page are hence 18 products in a 4 column grid layout.", "italic": true}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Q: Can I use Grid Control to display messages or campaigns?", "bold": true}, {"text": "
"}, {"text": "A:", "bold": true}, {"text": " "}, {"text": "Grid Control is built for products. Exclude Tailored Position if not applicable.", "italic": true}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Level: Advanced", "bold": true}]}, {"type": "ul", "children": [{"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Set up these two metafields definitions in your store (Time: "}, {"text": "2 min", "italic": true}, {"text": ")"}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Populate these fields for applicable collections (Time: "}, {"text": "Depending on number of collections", "italic": true}, {"text": ")"}]}]}]}, {"type": "rich_embed_card", "dataSourceType": "image", "url": "https://files.readme.io/17e79f5-Metafiled_Definition_Setup.png", "embedData": {"url": "https://files.readme.io/17e79f5-Metafiled_Definition_Setup.png", "embedType": "image", "displaySize": "large", "float": "none", "name": "879", "width": 1280, "height": 720}, "children": [{"text": ""}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "The two required Collection metafield definitions.", "italic": true}]}, {"type": "rich_embed_card", "dataSourceType": "image", "url": "https://files.readme.io/e2c9a1e-Metafiled_Tailored_Options_Setup.png", "embedData": {"url": "https://files.readme.io/e2c9a1e-Metafiled_Tailored_Options_Setup.png", "embedType": "image", "displaySize": "large", "float": "none", "name": "892", "width": 80}, "children": [{"text": ""}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "The definition for the Tailored Positions is a regular single line text.", "italic": true}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": ""}]}, {"type": "h2", "children": [{"text": "#7. Technical Implementation"}], "data-id": "7-technical-implementation"}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Firstly, we need to add metafields to our collections. To do that, go to Settings > Metafields."}, {"text": "
"}, {"text": "

"}, {"text": "gridControl (String List)"}]}, {"type": "rich_embed_card", "dataSourceType": "image", "url": "https://files.readme.io/c8a6064-Screenshot_4.jpg", "embedData": {"url": "https://files.readme.io/c8a6064-Screenshot_4.jpg", "embedType": "image", "displaySize": "large", "float": "none", "name": "794", "width": 1280, "height": 720}, "children": [{"text": ""}]}, {"type": "rich_embed_card", "dataSourceType": "image", "url": "https://files.readme.io/981c54e-Metafiled_Definition_Setup.png", "embedData": {"url": "https://files.readme.io/981c54e-Metafiled_Definition_Setup.png", "embedType": "image", "displaySize": "large", "float": "none", "name": "879", "width": 1280, "height": 720}, "children": [{"text": ""}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Then, we we need to add Findify's metafields script to our fallback in collection liquid file."}, {"text": "

Click 'Edit Code' for theme with integrated Findify."}]}, {"type": "rich_embed_card", "dataSourceType": "image", "url": "https://files.readme.io/07656f7-Screenshot_3.jpg", "embedData": {"url": "https://files.readme.io/07656f7-Screenshot_3.jpg", "embedType": "image", "displaySize": "large", "float": "none", "name": "967", "width": 1280, "height": 720}, "children": [{"text": ""}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "After that, open 'Sections' and choose 'collection.liquid' file. Add this code into findify-fallback container:"}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "shopifyCollectionFile.liquid"}]}, {"type": "code_block", "children": [{"type": "code_line", "children": [{"text": "{/* ...some code... */}<div class="findify-fallback" style="display:none;"> <div class="findify-metafields"><script>      let gridPositions = `{{collection.metafields.my_fields.grid_control_positions}}`;         let gridControl = `{{collection.metafields.my_fields.grid_control}}`;            /* Get collection metafields */            window.findifyMetafields = {              'gridPositions': gridPositions,               'gridControl': gridControl            }       </script></div>{/* ...some code... */}</div>"}]}], "lang": "plaintext"}, {"type": "rich_embed_card", "dataSourceType": "image", "url": "https://files.readme.io/571fbd2-__2022-05-27__16.01.40.png", "embedData": {"url": "https://files.readme.io/571fbd2-__2022-05-27__16.01.40.png", "embedType": "image", "displaySize": "large", "float": "none", "name": "1598", "width": 1280, "height": 720}, "children": [{"text": ""}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "The following steps require the use of Findify DevTools - changing the React components in the front end. If you have any challenges, Findify's team for professional services would be happy to assist."}, {"text": "
"}, {"text": "
"}, {"text": "Please get in touch through:"}, {"type": "a", "url": "mailto:support@maropost.com", "children": [{"text": "support@maropost.com"}]}]}, {"type": "blockquote", "children": [{"type": "blockquote-line", "children": [{"text": "Findify DevTool ExtensionTo learn how to work with the DevTools, please read more here."}]}]}, {"type": "blockquote", "children": [{"type": "blockquote-line", "children": [{"text": "Componentslayouts/Search/indexcomponents/Cards/Product/ndexhandleColumnsbreakGrid"}]}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Create handleColumns function and import it to layots/Search/index. This function is changing findify-data-grid attribute for search results container when breakpoints are updated. Don't forget to add some css!"}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "layouts/Search/index.tsxhandleColumnsCSSMJS 6 layouts/Search/view.tsxMJS 6 CSS"}]}, {"type": "code_block", "children": [{"type": "code_line", "children": [{"text": "import { handleColumns } from 'handleColumns';{/* ...some code... */}const sortedBreakpoints = config.getIn(['breakpoints', 'grid']).toJS().sort((a, b) => b.width - a.width);const checkColumns = () => handleColumns(sortedBreakpoints);useEffect(() => {  checkColumns();    {/* call func on resize */}  window.addEventListener('resize', checkColumns);  return () => window.removeEventListener('resize', checkColumns);}, []);{/* ...some code... */}"}]}], "lang": "plaintext"}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "In Cards/Product/index we need to import 2 functions. Later, we will create them."}]}, {"type": "ul", "children": [{"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "breakWithPositions"}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "breakWithoutPositions"}]}]}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": ""}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "We are using useEffect, so when component did mount, we call our functions depending on metafields."}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Also, we are changing product image, if product card has big grid."}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "components/Cards/Product/index.tsxMJS 6 components/Cards/Product/view.tsx"}]}, {"type": "code_block", "children": [{"type": "code_line", "children": [{"text": "import { breakWithPositions, breakWithoutPositions } from 'breakGrid';{/* ...some imports... */}{/* ... some code ...*/}{/* main function => */}let ifBigProduct = container?.current?.parentElement?.classList.contains('big-grid');useEffect(() => {  if(document.querySelector('.findify-components-search--lazy-results__prev-button')) {    return false;  };  let product = container?.current?.parentElement;  if(product.tagName === 'LI') {    const controlValue =  window?.findifyMetafields?.gridControl?.toLowerCase()?.replace(/[^a-zA-Z ]/g, "");    controlValue === 'tailored positions' ? breakWithPositions(product) : breakWithoutPositions(product, controlValue);  }});let newImage = ifBigProduct ? variant.get('image_url')?.replace('_large.', '_1800x1800.') : variant.get('image_url');let newSecondImage = ifBigProduct ? variant.get('image_2_url')?.replace('_large.', '_1800x1800.') : variant.get('image_2_url');..some code... */}return (  {/* ...some code... */}      {/* Change image src if broken grid */}    <Image      aspectRatio={config.getIn(['image', 'aspectRatio'])}      alt={variant.get('title')}      lazy={!isAutocomplete && config.getIn(['image', 'lazy'])}      src={        config.getIn(['image', 'multiple'])          ? [newImage, newSecondImage]          : newImage || variant.get('thumbnail_url')      }     />    {/* ...some code... */})"}]}], "lang": "plaintext"}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Finally, we need to create breakGrid component. Only 2 functions will be exported to Cards/Product/index."}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "If you are on MJS 6, please add "export" to defaultColumnsMapper function at "helpers/withColumns.ts" and change width values to window.innerWidth."}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "breakGridMJS 6 breakGrid"}]}, {"type": "code_block", "children": [{"type": "code_line", "children": [{"text": "const checkForPromoOverlay = (product, column) => {  let nodes = document.querySelectorAll('.promo-broken-grid');  if(nodes.length > 0) {    nodes.forEach((promo) => {    let promoRowStart = parseInt(promo.style.gridRowStart);    let promoColumnStart = parseInt(promo.style.gridColumnStart);    let promoColumnEnd = parseInt(promo.style.gridColumnEnd);    let productRowStart = parseInt(product.style.gridRowStart);    let productRowEnd = parseInt(product.style.gridRowEnd) ;    let productColumnEnd = parseInt(product.style.gridColumnEnd);    let productColumnStart = parseInt(product.style.gridColumnStart);        if(promoRowStart >= productRowStart && promoRowStart <= productRowEnd      && ((promoColumnStart < productColumnEnd) || (promoColumnEnd > productColumnStart))) {      product.style.gridColumn = null;      product.style.gridRow = null;      product.classList.add('promo-overlay');    }    })  }}const columnRules = {  '4': [7, 5],  '3': [11, 7],  '2': [19, 11]}const rightColumnStart = {  '4': 2,  '3': 3,  '2': 4,}const pushProduct = (product, columnPosition, rowPosition) => {  product.style.gridColumn = `${columnPosition} / ${columnPosition + 2}`;  product.style.gridRow = `${rowPosition} / ${rowPosition + 2}`;  product.classList.add('big-grid');}const checkForColumnState = () => {  switch(window.currentColumn) {    case(2): return 2;    case(3): return 3;     case(4): return 4;    default: return false;  }}export const breakWithPositions = (product) => {  const column = checkForColumnState();  const positions = window.findifyMetafields.gridPositions.split('#');  const order = product?.style.order - 1;  const productInList = positions.find((num) => num === `${order}`);  if(product.classList.contains('big-grid') || (product.classList.contains('promo-overlay'))) {    checkForPromoOverlay(product, column);    return false;  }  if(column && !product.classList.contains('big-grid') && productInList) {    const nodes = document.querySelectorAll('.big-grid');    let currentColumnPosition = order % (12 / column);    let currentRowPosition = Math.ceil(order / (12 / column));    if(currentColumnPosition === 0) { currentColumnPosition = (12 / column) - 1 };    if(nodes.length === 0) {      pushProduct(product, currentColumnPosition, currentRowPosition);    }    else {      let doNotPush = false;      document.querySelectorAll('.big-grid').forEach((previousProduct) => {        if(doNotPush) { return false };        const preRowStart = parseInt(previousProduct.style.gridRowStart);        const preRowEnd = parseInt(previousProduct.style.gridRowEnd) - 1;        const preColumnStart = parseInt(previousProduct.style.gridColumnStart);        const preColumnEnd = parseInt(previousProduct.style.gridColumnEnd) - 1;        if(column === 4 && (currentRowPosition >= preRowStart && currentRowPosition <= preRowEnd)) {          doNotPush = true;        }        if(currentColumnPosition >= preColumnStart && currentColumnPosition <= preColumnEnd && currentRowPosition >= preRowStart && currentRowPosition <= preRowEnd) {          doNotPush = true;        }      });      if(!doNotPush) {        pushProduct(product, currentColumnPosition, currentRowPosition)      }    }  }};export const breakWithoutPositions = (product, controlValue) => {  const column = checkForColumnState();  const order = product?.style.order - 1;  if(product.classList.contains('big-grid')) {    checkForPromoOverlay(product);  }  if(column && !product.classList.contains('big-grid') && (controlValue === 'start left aligned' || controlValue === 'start right aligned')) {    let gridLeft = controlValue === 'start left aligned' ? true : false;    const nodes = document.querySelectorAll('.big-grid');    if(nodes.length === 0) {      if(gridLeft) {        pushProduct(product, 1, 1)      }      else if(order === (12 / column) - 1) {        pushProduct(product, rightColumnStart[column], 1);      }    }    else {      const previousProduct = nodes[nodes.length - 1];      const previousLeft = parseInt(previousProduct.style.gridColumnStart) === 1;      const previousOrder = parseInt(previousProduct.style.order - 1);      const previousRowEnd = parseInt(previousProduct.style.gridRowEnd);      if(!previousLeft) {        if(order - previousOrder === columnRules[column][1]) {          pushProduct(product, 1, previousRowEnd + 1);        }      }      if(previousLeft) {        if(order - previousOrder === columnRules[column][0]) {          pushProduct(product, rightColumnStart[column], previousRowEnd + 1);        }      }    }  }};"}]}], "lang": "plaintext"}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": ""}]}]
